arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals the date Manchester City will discover the verdict of the 115 charges hearing against the Premier League
arts.sum: Mail Sport exclusively revealed that the hearing into the Premier League's charges against City concluded on December 6. The Premier League accused them of multiple breaches of financial rules.
